results.title: Montana Land Board moves MPG land swap proposal forward
results.description: A closely watched proposal for the state to exchange public lands in the northern Bitterroot Valley for privately held land east of Clinton won preliminary approval on Monday.

results.title: Labor's 'do little' motto is failing Australians on this integral front
results.description: It's been over a century and we still don't have this key law.
